name: Italian Sausage and Peppers (Fdgn81a)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pound Hot or sweet italian sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, heat the sausage with water to boiling.
2. Cover and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Remove the cover; continue cooking, turning the sausages frequently, until the water evaporates and the sausage links are well browned, about 20 minutes.
4. Remove the sausages to paper towels to drain.
5. Pour off all but about 3 tbsp of fat from the skillet.
6. Add the green peppers, onions, salt, and oregano leaves; cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the vegetables are tender.
7. Add the cooked sausage links to the vegetables; heat through.
